title: RF-002 DTO Shape And Projection Parity
objective: Make DTO shape contracts and projection contracts first-class resolver-supported, cross-language parity surfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: dto-shape-parity-basic passes in Node, Python, and C#.
dto-projection-parity-basic passes in Node, Python, and C#.
dto-unsupported-field-blocked blocks in Node, Python, and C#.
Projection evidence includes dtoContractKey, projectionContractKey, projectionSource, shape hash, resolver language, and unsupported reason.
nonGoals: Do not invent product DTO vocabulary in resolver.
Do not detect DTO stitching in resolver as product governance; emit structured evidence for conveyor audit.
Do not generate hand-authored language DTOs.
completionPosture: DTO shape truth is language-neutral and projection evidence is identical across resolver languages.
